task.title: Harden agents logs raw and follow output

events.content: Use Buffer reads for raw agents logs and stream byte chunks through cooked follow: Use Buffer reads for raw agents logs and stream byte chunks through cooked follow

raw.question: Use Buffer reads for raw agents logs and stream byte chunks through cooked follow
raw.chosen: Use Buffer reads for raw agents logs and stream byte chunks through cooked follow
raw.reasoning: Raw output must avoid UTF-8 decoding entirely, while cooked follow needs TextDecoder streaming so multibyte codepoints split by polling are reconstructed before ANSI replay

retrospective.summary: Hardened agents:logs raw output to write Buffer bytes unchanged and made cooked follow preserve split ANSI CSI and UTF-8 sequences across poll chunks
